final_prompt.prompt:
Create a WeChat article cover for a fragrance product launch.

Style/medium: needs a "高级质感风" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Kinfolk magazine still-life editorial, Aesop product photography heritage, 2010s Céline campaign minimalism; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be centered composition with the title as the focal point
Subject: must include the fragrance product launch context
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a refined, elegant atmosphere — exact lighting treatment is yours
Color palette: needs an autumn-inspired palette — exact color mix is yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "染秋" (large, primary), "秋意染染 时光留香" (secondary)
Constraints: must be 900x500 aspect ratio
Avoid:
